channel.title: Self-Hosting on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in Self-Hosting on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist

item.title: Building a Cyber Security Home Lab: Why Local Hardware Beats the Cloud
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Cloud labs are convenient, but local virtualization offers control. Here is why I switched to a local KVM setup on Arch Linux for my Master's studies.

item.title: My Jellyfin Setup in a Debian LXC Container
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Learn how to install Jellyfin Media Server in a Debian LXC container on Proxmox. This step-by-step guide covers setup, storage, and troubleshooting.

item.title: Build an Enterprise-Grade Cloud at Home: The Ultimate Proxmox Setup Guide (Part 1)
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Ready to build a powerful home server? Our A-Z guide walks you through Proxmox VE installation, from hardware selection to your first login. Start now!
